title: Pokémon Stadium Lite
intro: Set up your connection to enter the arena and challenge other trainers.
nicknameInUse: This nickname is already in use.
serverCheckFailed: Could not verify the nickname with the server (timeout, network, or server unavailable).
invalidServerError: You cannot enter until you set up a valid server.
nicknameTooShort: Nickname must be longer than 3 characters.
connectionFailed: Could not connect via WebSocket. Check the server URL and your network.
